guards.identity_2026_07_14_CORRECTED: THE IDENTITY IS SOUND AND IT IS THE OWNER'S. A prior supervisor annotation (pushed c48d390, corrected within the hour) argued the pick SHOULD be worth less than the player because of a 'cost of holding'. IT MISREAD V0. V0 is the player's value the day AFTER the draft; the PVC is the pick's value the day BEFORE. ONE DAY APART. THERE IS NOTHING TO DISCOUNT. Owner verbatim 2026-07-14: 'if we're talking about picks and the players immediately post draft (i.e. pure v0 players), then they should be relatively even on average... otherwise 1 day after the draft there'd be a heap of value created or lost which is nonsensical.' CLAIM 1 (position conditioning redistributes, deviations net to zero) AND CLAIM 2 (composition-weighted mean V0 == derived PVC) ARE BOTH THE OWNER'S AND BOTH STAND. POSITIONAL CAVEAT IS PART OF THE LAW: some drafts are positionally weaker and SHOULD land below the PVC, others stronger and above. THE IDENTITY HOLDS ON AVERAGE ACROSS DRAFTS, NOT DRAFT-BY-DRAFT. A single class off the curve is a weak or strong class, NOT a breach. MEASURE ACROSS MULTIPLE DRAFTS. The holding-cost question belongs to a DIFFERENT comparison (pick vs the player's PEAK/career value), where the owner's 'how do you even value the player - peak? a window across the peak? it's arbitrary' does bite. DO NOT WELD THEM TOGETHER AGAIN.
guards.fix_direction_STALE_DO_NOT_APPLY: The recorded fix_direction (raise_young_side_never_cut_survivors_never_bend_derived_curve) was drafted 2026-07-11 anticipating V0 < PVC ('the weighted average sits BELOW the curve broadly'). THE MEASUREMENT CAME BACK THE OTHER WAY: comp-weighted V0 > derived PVC in EVERY band (+19..+281, widest picks 21-30) - THE DRAFT CREATES VALUE. THE YOUNG SIDE IS ALREADY THE HIGH SIDE; RAISING IT WOULD WIDEN THE GAP. NOBODY UPDATED THE REMEDY. The PVC re-derivation must re-derive THE CURE, not only the numbers. DO NOT ACT ON THE RECORDED FIX DIRECTION.

guards.known_gap: STATED IN BOTH DIRECTIONS (corrected 2026-07-14 after the owner's audit). (1) rl_model.py IS PINNED AND THE PIN IS CORRECT: data/expected_boot.json carries rl_model=952ddb3d15fe6d4f72432d431abe75cc and it matches the live file exactly. An earlier supervisor claim that it was 'recorded by NOTHING' was WRONG. What is true is narrower: boot_guard.assert_boot() NEVER CHECKS IT (its signature takes store, engine_head, band, register - no rl_model path), and the book's __meta__ does not record it. So closing this half is WIRING AN EXISTING, CORRECT PIN INTO THE ASSERTION - not creating one. Precedent, same file, second time: the 'board' pin was DECORATIVE in exactly this way until the S1 audit asserted it (register item 24). (2) THE UNSTAMPED INPUTS ARE MORE NUMEROUS THAN PREVIOUSLY STATED (D6, determinism return e646abb): peak_model_v4.pkl (b763f59e), pvc_snapshot.json (735d2dec), bust_prior_table.json (ffb54267), plus several data tables - all loaded by the board, none in expected_boot.json. And q97m - the model refitted at import on every run - is pinned by nothing at all. G-BOOK CANNOT BE DECLARED COMPLETE UNTIL THE BOOK'S STAMP COVERS EVERY INPUT THAT DETERMINES THE BOARD. Closing this gap is a PREREQUISITE of the captain-curve wiring.

anchors.diagnosis: THE GAP IS NOT FLATTERY. Census decomposition (numeraire): sanders = base 3903 + iso 58 + par_credit 0 (flat -21); bont = base 3070 + par_credit 439 + iso -28 (flat -29). Neither carries par-relative flattery, so THE FLATTERY FIX WILL NOT CLOSE PAIR 3. The gap is made by the BASE CURVE (pick-band price x growth on the young side) => it belongs to the PVC RE-DERIVATION / pricing-curve formalisation chapter (adjacent to G-CONVEX's young premium). NO HAND EDIT: cutting sanders to satisfy the read would be a predicate-based nerf wearing a rule's clothes (the owner's own remediation doctrine).
anchors.auditor_instruction: SCORE BOTH PAIRS against the OWNER-RULED bands (pair 2: |delta| <= 10% · pair 3: bont above sanders by 0-10%). Pair 3 is EXPECTED to fail until the pricing curve is re-derived — report and SCORE it; never report it as a skip. A-PAIRS is OWNER_ON_SIGHT, so a pair-3 failure is not by itself a bake blocker.

laws.text: the +1/+2 lens must show PROJECTED value (expected production credited for gap years); interim lens = no-improvement floor, cross-age trades NOT read off it
laws.provenance: owner-ruled 2026-07-13, register v46; build rides the flattery-fix chapter

laws.text: one bake per chapter; changes batch onto a candidate and walk ONE ladder; UI and ingestion never bake
laws.provenance: owner-driven, seat-3 round; full text CORE v2.4

laws.text: The engine must require THE SAME WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE to believe a player has IMPROVED as to believe he has DECLINED, and must deliver BOTH through CONTINUOUS RAMPS - never a threshold on one side and a ramp on the other.
laws.owner_wording_verbatim: Risers should have the same smoothing/ramping. And you should have to have the same drop for the engine to think you're declining as a rise for it to think you're rising.
laws.asymmetry_corrected: A RISE requires >=5.0 points (TOL_M1) AND a 12-game season above the old level (_radq); fail EITHER and the ENTIRE improvement is DELETED, not reduced - all 124 denied improvers ship at EXACTLY their old level (core==Lo). A DECLINE requires 3.0 points (DOWN_TOL) and NO games test at all, delivered by a SMOOTH RAMP. RISERS FACE CLIFFS; FALLERS GET A RAMP. Rachele improved 4.93 and got NOTHING; MacDonald improved 5.04 and got 3.53 points of level.
laws.measured_cost: +28,820 SCAR DENIED to improvers = 71.7% of ALL measured improvement (S_AGE 14,637 / TOL_M1 12,268 / _radq 1,915). The flattery census found +19,168 of OVERvaluation - the DENIAL is 1.5x LARGER and points the OTHER WAY.
laws.relationship_to_R98_2: STRICTER THAN SMOOTHNESS. R98.2 forbids the CLIFF; L-SYMMETRY additionally forbids an UNEQUAL BAR. Two smooth ramps with different thresholds SATISFY R98.2 AND VIOLATE THIS LAW.

laws.text: The age-persistence discount on an improvement (S_AGE) must FADE TO A MEASURED RESIDUAL. It MAY NOT REACH ZERO on the assertion of a curve nobody has tested at that end.
laws.indefensible_cases: Callum Wilkie (+406) and Jack Sinclair (+143) CLEARED BOTH EVIDENCE GATES (>=5.0 points AND a 12-game season above their old level) and received EXACTLY ZERO because of their birthdays. The gates and S_AGE ask the same question twice and the AGE test OVERRIDES the EVIDENCE test completely.
laws.precedent: The draft pedigree still carries a significantly-positive ~0.11 residual at n=4 (CI [0.04,0.17], EXCLUDES ZERO) and the engine zeroes it anyway (PROVEN_N). VANISH-WHERE-IT-SHOULD-FADE is a PATTERN in this codebase, not an accident.
laws.remediation: MEASURE the 30+ residual; REPLACE the asserted zero with the measured fade. NOBODY HAS EVER TESTED WHETHER THE ZERO IS REAL.

notes: player_key values follow the engine's key convention; a build must verify each key against the source store before asserting, and report any key mismatch rather than guessing (the toby-briggs drift is the standing example).
Anchors with min_delta_pct null pass on direction only; magnitude is owner-ruled on sight (Q3 closed). Owner reads are challengeable per CORE MISSION; only the owner waives a read.
The auditor ASSERTS the class-sum construction and the walk-forward property BY READING THE SCRIPT'S CODE. Post code-conform, the ship_gates B1 implementation IS the July-8 construction.

bake_blocker.rule: NO BAKE until every guard, anchor, the flattery census and the discontinuity census are RE-MEASURED on the frozen build and RECONCILED against the figure recorded in this file and the register.
bake_blocker.why: The cross-environment drift is 0.35-1.8% per player. G-COHORT's y4 margin is ~3% (1.2601 vs a hard 1.30). The drift is HALF the narrowest binding margin. The five-shard cold audit ran in incognito sandboxes - different machines from the bake - so every figure here certified a board it did not build. Not necessarily wrong. Not established. CORE rule 4: report-only never sits in VERIFIED.
bake_blocker.clears_when: the q97m freeze lands and every figure is re-measured on the frozen build and reconciled; any that moves gets a register entry.
